entities.name: Fitbit
entities.context: Fitness tracking platform whose activity data is synced into the local workout database

entities.name: workout_tracker
entities.context: Python module that logs workouts, computes heart rate stats from intraday data, and backfills missing HR data

entities.name: workouts.db
entities.context: Local SQLite database storing workout records and heart rate statistics

entities.name: Fitbit Sync Helper
entities.context: CLI script (argparse-based) that orchestrates importing Fitbit activities into workouts.db with HR enrichment

entities.name: Heart Rate Intraday Data
entities.context: Per-second or per-minute HR samples used to compute average and peak HR for each workout

entities.name: HR Stats Backfill
entities.context: Final-pass process that retroactively fills HR stats for workouts imported before intraday data was available

relationships.context: Pulls activity logs (logId, date, duration, timestamps) from Fitbit API
Calls log_manual_workout, compute_workout_hr_from_intraday, update_workout_hr_stats, and backfill_workout_hr_stats
Writes imported workout records and HR statistics to the local database
Reads and writes workout records and HR stats via a database connection
Backfill uses intraday HR data to enrich workouts that were initially imported without HR stats
compute_workout_hr_from_intraday derives avg_hr, peak_hr, and sample_count from intraday samples
